Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS
REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Relates to enforcement of toll collection regulations and license plate violations
Summary: Relates to enforcement of toll collection regulations and license plate violations; permits registration suspension, seizure and liens.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law and the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to enforcement of toll collection regulations and license plate violations
